title: About QBS Global
content: QBS Global FZCO is a Dubai-based agency and software studio, licensed in the IFZA Free Zone. We run four service lines for growing businesses worldwide: Social Media Management; Software, AI and Automation; Project Management; and HR Consultancy with global hiring (Employer of Record). We are founder-led — you work directly with the people who deliver the work.
keywords: about, who, company, what is qbs, qbs global, services, what do you do

title: Jurisdiction and license
content: QBS Global FZCO is registered in the IFZA Free Zone, Dubai, UAE, under Trade Licence 52838. Licensed activities cover Social Media Marketing, Software Houses, Project Management Services, and HR Consultancy.
keywords: license, ifza, jurisdiction, legal, dubai, registration, trade licence

title: Service coverage
content: Software, AI and automation, social media management, and project management are delivered worldwide. Global hiring via Employer of Record also operates internationally. Traditional UAE HR compliance work (visas, MOHRE filings, Emiratization) is UAE and GCC only.
keywords: global, where, coverage, international, locations, worldwide

title: Contact
content: Email sales@qbsglobal.ae. WhatsApp or call +971 56 181 4519. Website qbsglobal.ae. Based in Dubai, UAE, working with clients globally.
keywords: contact, email, phone, whatsapp, reach, get in touch, address

title: Founder-led
content: QBS Global is founder-led — on your call you speak directly with the person who designs and builds your solution, not an account manager. The founder is PMP-certified.

title: Why QBS Global
content: We pair an in-house SaaS portfolio with full-service delivery — the same team that built our own products runs your projects. One accountable partner for software, AI, automation, social, projects, and people.

title: What does QBS Global do?
content: We run four service lines: Social Media Management; Software, AI and Automation; Project Management (PMP-certified, remote); and HR Consultancy with global hiring (Employer of Record). Most clients start with one and expand into the others.
keywords: what do you do, services, offerings, service lines

title: Do you work outside the UAE?
content: Yes. Software, AI and automation, social media, project management, and global hiring (EOR) are delivered internationally. Only traditional UAE HR compliance work (visas, MOHRE) is limited to the UAE and GCC.
keywords: international, global, outside uae, work abroad, worldwide

title: Can you hire staff for us abroad?
content: Yes — through our Employer of Record and offshore staff augmentation. We become the legal employer in the talent's country, handle payroll, tax, and labour-law compliance, and your hire works full-time as part of your team from our managed office. No foreign entity needed.
keywords: eor, hire abroad, employer of record, offshore, staff, global hiring

title: Are your project managers PMP-certified?
content: Yes. Our project management practice is led by a PMP-certified founder and a network of certified project managers, working remotely as an extension of your team.
keywords: pmp, certified, project manager, qualified

title: Can you build an AI agent or chatbot?
content: Yes. We build AI agents and assistants trained on your own content — support and lead-capture chatbots, internal ask-your-documents assistants, and voice agents — plus AI features inside your own software. The assistant on this site is one of ours.
keywords: ai agent, chatbot, build ai, assistant, automation

title: How much does it cost?
